title: pelargonium campestre
intro: Pelargonium campestre, a species of succulent plant, is a member of the Geraniaceae family and is also known as the "bush geranium." It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium campestre include its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues, sore throats, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Pelargonium campestre is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
